zh.lifeSummary: 當Catherine Boteler於1361年出生在愛爾蘭萊音斯特時，她的父親James Boteler 2nd Earl of Ormond30歲，母親Lady Elizabeth Anne de Darcy, Countess of Badsworth and Ormond29歲。她於1381年與Thomas Reade III在英國諾薩普頓史爾波丁頓結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。她去世於1380年在英國米德萊可倫敦享年19歲，埋葬在愛爾蘭萊音斯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Catherine Boteler于1361年出生在爱尔兰萊音斯特时，她的父亲James Boteler 2nd Earl of Ormond30岁，母亲Lady Elizabeth Anne de Darcy, Countess of Badsworth and Ormond29岁。她于1381年与Thomas Reade III在英国諾薩普頓史爾波丁頓结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。她去世于1380年在英国米德萊可倫敦享年19岁，埋葬在爱尔兰萊音斯特。

nameMeanings.name: Boteler
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a maker of leather bottles, from an agent derivative of Middle English botel, Old French bouteille ‘bottle’.

en.lifeSummary: When Catherine Boteler was born in 1361, in Leinster, Ireland, her father, James Boteler 2nd Earl of Ormond, was 30 and her mother, Lady Elizabeth Anne de Darcy, Countess of Badsworth and Ormond, was 29. She married Thomas Reade III in 1381, in Boddington, Northamptonshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. She died in 1380, in London, Middlesex, England, at the age of 19, and was buried in Leinster, Ireland.

fr.County of the Cross of Tipperary, Irelan: County of the Cross of Tipperary, Irlande
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Catherine Boteler est née en 1361, à Leinster, Irlande, son père, James Boteler 2nd Earl of Ormond, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Lady Elizabeth Anne de Darcy, Countess of Badsworth and Ormond, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Reade III en 1381, à Boddington, Northamptonshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Elle est décédée en 1380, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 19 ans, et a été enterrée à Leinster, Irlande.

de.County of the Cross of Tipperary, Irelan: County of the Cross of Tipperary, Irland
de.lifeSummary: Als Catherine Boteler 1361 in Leinster, Irland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater James Boteler 2nd Earl of Ormond 30 und ihre Mutter Lady Elizabeth Anne de Darcy, Countess of Badsworth and Ormond 29. Sie hat 1381 in Boddington, Northamptonshire, England Thomas Reade III geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Sie starb 1380 im Alter von 19 Jahren in London, Middlesex, England und wurde in Leinster, Irland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Catherine Boteler è nata il nel 1361 nel Leinster, Irlanda, sua padre, James Boteler 2nd Earl of Ormond, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Lady Elizabeth Anne de Darcy, Countess of Badsworth and Ormond, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Reade III nel 1381, nel Boddington, Northamptonshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì nel 1380, nel London, Middlesex, England, all'età di 19 anni, e fu sepolta a Leinster, Irlanda.

ja.lifeSummary: Catherine Botelerが1361年にアイルランドレインスターで生まれた時，父James Boteler 2nd Earl of Ormondは30歳，母Lady Elizabeth Anne de Darcy, Countess of Badsworth and Ormondは29歳であった。1381年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアボッドイントンでThomas Reade IIIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼女は1380年にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドンで19歳で死去し，アイルランドレインスターにて埋葬された。

ko.County of the Cross of Tipperary, Irelan: 아일랜드 카운티 프 테 크로스 프 티페라리
ko.lifeSummary: Catherine Boteler(이)가 1361년 아일랜드 레인스터에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 James Boteler 2nd Earl of Ormond(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Elizabeth Anne de Darcy, Countess of Badsworth and Ormond(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 1381년 영국 노르섬프토실르 보딩턴에서 Thomas Reade III(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1380년 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 19세의 나이로 사망했으며 아일랜드 레인스터에 묻혔다.

pt.County of the Cross of Tipperary, Irelan: County of the Cross of Tipperary, Irlanda
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Catherine Boteler nasceu em 1361, em Leinster, Irlanda, seu pai, James Boteler 2nd Earl of Ormond, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Lady Elizabeth Anne de Darcy, Countess of Badsworth and Ormond, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Reade III em 1381, em Boddington, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1380, em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, com 19 anos, e foi sepultada em Leinster, Irlanda.

ru.County of the Cross of Tipperary, Irelan: коунти оф т кросс оф типпирэри, Ирландия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Catherine Boteler родилась в 1361 г. в местности линстир, Ирландия, её отцу по имени James Boteler 2nd Earl of Ormond было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Elizabeth Anne de Darcy, Countess of Badsworth and Ormond, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Reade III в 1381 г. в местности боддингтон, нортамптоншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Она умерла в 1380 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия в возрасте 19 лет и была похоронена в местности линстир, Ирландия.

es.County of the Cross of Tipperary, Irelan: County of the Cross of Tipperary, Irlanda
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Catherine Boteler nació en 1361, en Leinster, Irlanda, su papá, James Boteler 2nd Earl of Ormond, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Lady Elizabeth Anne de Darcy, Countess of Badsworth and Ormond, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Thomas Reade III en 1381, en Boddington, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió en 1380, en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 19 años, y fue sepultada en Leinster, Irlanda.
